scripts.dev: sh -lc 'if ! cargo watch --version >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo "Installing cargo-watch..."; cargo install cargo-watch; fi; export BIND_ADDR="${BIND_ADDR:-0.0.0.0:3000}"; export RUST_LOG="${RUST_LOG:-dlkn_socket_bridge=trace,axum=info}"; exec cargo watch --watch src -s '\''cargo run || kill -TERM "$PPID"'\'''
